Package com.nib.tn3270

Class Tn3270ThreadedHandler

java.lang.Object
com.nib.tn3270.Tn3270Handler
com.nib.tn3270.Tn3270ThreadedHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.nib.tn3270.comms.SessionResolver, ITn3270, Runnable
public class Tn3270ThreadedHandler extends Tn3270Handler implements Runnable
